# Kartoney.com

> Kartoney (كارتوني) is the largest free Arabic cartoon and anime streaming library, featuring over 8,600 episodes across 107 series spanning 4 decades (1980s–2010s).

## About

Kartoney.com is a free Arabic-language cartoon and anime streaming platform. The site offers dubbed Arabic versions of classic and modern animated series. Content is organized by genre, era, and type for easy discovery.

## Content Library

- **Total Series**: 107 cartoon and anime series
- **Total Episodes**: 8,611 episodes
- **Languages**: Arabic dubbed
- **Genres**: Action (أكشن), Adventure (مغامرة), Comedy (كوميدي), Drama (دراما), Fantasy (فنتازيا), Mystery (غموض), Romance (رومانسي), Sci-Fi (خيال علمي), Sports (رياضي), Family (عائلي)
- **Eras**: 1980s classics, 1990s golden age, 2000s modern, 2010s contemporary

## Popular Series

- المحقق كونان (Detective Conan) — 437 episodes, Action/Mystery
- ناروتو عربي (Naruto Arabic) — 692 episodes, Action/Adventure
- وان بيس (One Piece) — 936 episodes, Action/Adventure/Fantasy
- دراغون بول (Dragon Ball) — 153 episodes, Action/Adventure
- سلام دانك (Slam Dunk) — 106 episodes, Sports/Comedy
- هايدي (Heidi) — 94 episodes, Family/Drama
- جراندايزر (Grendizer) — 74 episodes, Sci-Fi/Action
- يوقي يو (Yu-Gi-Oh) — 546 episodes, Action
- كابتن ماجد (Captain Tsubasa) — 128 episodes, Sports

## Features

- Browse by genre, era, or type
- Search in Arabic and English
- Season and episode navigation
- Integrated video player with episode sidebar
- Responsive design (mobile + desktop)
- RTL (right-to-left) Arabic interface

## Technical Details

- Static single-page application (SPA)
- Client-side SQLite database via sql.js (WebAssembly)
- No backend server required
- Hash-based routing

## Contact

- Website: https://kartoney.com
- Domain: kartoney.com
